title: Define LICHEN app-level inbound event source for Meshtastic gateway
description: The gateway now exposes and tests gateway_meshtastic_adapter_emit_text/status wrappers, but no production LICHEN app-level source currently calls them. Current L2 RX terminates at net_recv_data(), and the native message_received path is only the non-L2 LoRa compatibility path, so there is no semantic inbound message/status callback that can be wired without defining a source contract. Define/implement the no-hardware event source for inbound LICHEN messages and status, connect it to gateway_meshtastic_adapter_emit_text/status, and add qemu/native_sim tests proving the production path. Physical radio validation should remain a separate child if needed.
acceptance_criteria: A production no-hardware LICHEN message/status source invokes the Meshtastic gateway emit wrappers; qemu/native_sim tests prove text and status reach BLE FromRadio via that path; any physical-radio validation is split to a hardware child Bead.
notes:
Implemented no-hardware production inbound source for Meshtastic gateway. Added gateway_inbound_emit_text/status facade in lichen/apps/gateway/src/inbound_events.[ch], mapping gateway text/status events to gateway_meshtastic_adapter_emit_text/status with adapter-independent NULL validation. Added lichen/apps/gateway/src/inbound_coap.[ch] with production CoAP POST handlers for /inbound/text and /inbound/status registered only under CONFIG_LORA_LICHEN_MESHTASTIC_BLE; handlers call gateway_inbound_emit_text/status and return empty CoAP response codes directly. CMake now builds inbound_coap.c, inbound_events.c, ble_meshtastic.c, and meshtastic_adapter.c together for Meshtastic BLE gateway builds. Tests in lichen/tests/meshtastic_gateway_adapter now construct real Zephyr coap_packet POST payloads and prove handler -> inbound facade -> Meshtastic adapter -> fake BLE FromRadio for text and status; invalid text/status payloads return 4.00 Bad Request; direct wrapper NULL coverage restored.

Review evidence: initial reviews found P1 missing production caller/test and P2 invalid text payload mapping; fixed by adding inbound_coap production handlers, mapping -EMSGSIZE to 4.00, and adding CoAP handler qemu tests. Final independent reviews Ramanujan, Dalton, and Parfit reported no P0/P1/P2 findings. Residual non-blocking no-hardware URI-dispatch gap filed as project-LICHEN-t2hn.8.2.1.1. Hardware RF/app validation split as project-LICHEN-t2hn.8.2.2.

Validation evidence: git diff --check PASS. west build -p always -b qemu_x86 lichen/tests/meshtastic_gateway_adapter -d build/meshtastic_gateway_adapter_qemu_t2hn821 PASS; RAM 279352 B / 31 MB. qemu run with temporary /tmp/slip.sock listener PASS: meshtastic_gateway_adapter 11/11, PROJECT EXECUTION SUCCESSFUL; QEMU wrapper terminated by timeout after success as expected. west build -p always -b qemu_x86 lichen/apps/gateway -d build/gateway_qemu_meshtastic_bt_t2hn821 -- -DCONFIG_BT=y -DCONFIG_BT_PERIPHERAL=y -DCONFIG_BT_MAX_CONN=1 -DEXTRA_CONF_FILE=meshtastic_compat.conf PASS; RAM 321980 B / 31 MB. Expected warnings: CONFIG_TIMER_RANDOM_GENERATOR testing warning and no sources for drivers__entropy/spi in qemu gateway build. No EC2 resources used for this slice.
close_reason: Completed: production no-hardware CoAP inbound text/status source now invokes Meshtastic gateway emit wrappers, qemu tests prove CoAP handler to BLE FromRadio path for text/status, final three reviews clean, physical validation split to project-LICHEN-t2hn.8.2.2.
